## Type of change

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] Snapshot updated with any new files, tables, env vars, or conventions
- [ ] No production credentials in any committed file
- [ ] No `window.confirm`, `window.alert`, or `window.prompt`
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] No inline styles (except email templates)
